creator: smh@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 215084
fixes cloud support

This fixes support for the recently added app.netdata.cloud
This depends on:
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=246878
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=246880

I will submit a PR to netdata to support the shared libs for mosquitto and libwebsockets.
